description_long: This is a blocky, geometric cup with a rectangular body and a square handle attached to one side. The cup is predominantly white, with a small, dark square opening at the top, suggesting the interior is hollow and capable of holding liquid. The handle is a simple rectangular loop, large enough for a finger to pass through. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with sharp edges and flat surfaces. There are no visible decorations, branding, or text on the exterior. The cup appears to be made of a hard, opaque material, likely ceramic or plastic.
description: A minimalist, white, rectangular cup with a square handle and a small dark opening at the top. The design is modern and unadorned.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from the side, showing the square handle and the dark opening at the top.
description_view_1: The back of the cup is visible, with the handle partially obscured and the top opening just visible.
description_view_2: The cup is viewed from the opposite side, showing the plain rectangular body and the top opening.
description_view_3: The front of the cup is shown, with the handle clearly visible and the dark opening at the top.
